title: US stock market crash: Dow, S&P 500 and Nasdaq down today - Here's biggest gainers and losers amid Dow Jones 550 crash
description: US stock market crash: Dow, S&P 500 and Nasdaq down today. The Dow Jones fell 562 points to 47,392.51. The S&P 500 dropped 75 points to 6,754.75. The Nasdaq slipped 217 points to 22,531.24. Investors reacted to rising oil prices, bond yields, and economic uncertainty. WTI crude surged 9.6% to $88.79, increasing inflation fears. Crypto also weakened. Bitcoin fell to $68,331. Some stocks still rallied. Day One Biopharmaceuticals jumped 65%. Marvell Technology rose nearly 17%. Losers included Owlet, Nvidia, Tesla, and Intel. Traders now watch the US jobs report and Federal Reserve rate outlook.
ai_comment: US stock market experienced a sharp decline today due to rising oil prices, bond yields, and economic uncertainty. WTI crude surged, impacting inflation concerns. Crypto weakened, with Bitcoin falling. Amidst this, some stocks rallied significantly while others like Owlet, Nvidia, Tesla, and Intel faced losses. Investors are now focused on the US jobs report and Federal Reserve rate outlook. Risk Score: 85. Kesin fırsatlar var, ancak dikkatli olunmalı.
